title: Withering Inventory
description: All your items lose 1 durability every second..
body:
Every 20 ticks all the items in your inventory lose 1 durability! Can you still beat Minecraft despite this?



Features:

- Every 20 ticks your entire inventory (including armour you are wearing) loses 1 durability, unless it has unbreaking
- /delay command allowing you to customise how frequently your items take damage
- /pauseitemdamage command allowing to disable/enable this mod
